dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3539 IS: To require the release of video of strikes conducted on September 2, 2025, against designated terrorist organizations in the area of responsibility of the United States Southern Command.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schiff introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To require the release of video of strikes conducted on September 2, 2025, against designated terrorist organizations in the area of responsibility of the United States Southern Command.

section.header: Required release to Congress of unedited video of September 2, 2025, boat strikes
section.text: Not later than 10 calendar days after the date of the enactment of this Act, the Secretary of Defense shall make available to all members of Congress unedited video of strikes conducted on September 2, 2025, against designated terrorist organizations in the area of responsibility of the United States Southern Command.

section.header: Required public release of video of September 2, 2025, boat strikes

subsection.text: Not later than 15 calendar days after the date of the enactment of this Act, the Secretary of Defense shall make publicly available on a Department of Defense website video of strikes conducted on September 2, 2025, against designated terrorist organizations in the area of responsibility of the United States Southern Command.
The Secretary of Defense may remove or obscure such material in the video released under subsection (a) as necessary in order to protect appropriately classified information.
